thought.text: 找到了！让我更新 CMakeLists.txt 来使用正确的路径：

action.old_str:
# task5-classic: LLVM IR -> RV64 assembly lowering (student-implemented).

set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_SOURCE_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Target/RISCV")
set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include")
action.new_str:
# task5-classic: LLVM IR -> RV64 assembly lowering (student-implemented).

set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_SOURCE_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Target/RISCV")
set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/build/lib/Target/RISCV")

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/5/CMakeLists.txt", "old_str": "# task5-classic: LLVM IR -> RV64 assembly lowering (student-implemented).

set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_SOURCE_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Target/RISCV")
set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include")", "new_str": "# task5-classic: LLVM IR -> RV64 assembly lowering (student-implemented).

set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_SOURCE_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/Target/RISCV")
set(TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR "${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/build/lib/Target/RISCV")"}
